_meta.purpose: A-3 T-A3.1 — top-5 production query shapes per consumer × 3 consumers = 15 fixtures.
_meta.source_of_truth: Real consumer code where available. Synthesized + flagged where not.
_meta.schema_naming_caveat: envio Hasura exposes PascalCase entity names (e.g. `MintEvent`, `MiberaTransfer`, `BadgeHolder`) because envio's entity-name → PostgreSQL table mapping preserves the schema.graphql case. Ponder's `ponder.schema.ts` uses snake_case Postgres table names (e.g. `mint_event`, `mibera_transfer`, `badge_holder`). The cutover script `scripts/cutover-hasura-tracking.sh` jq-bakes `select: .table.name` which is the literal Postgres name → snake_case for Ponder. POST-CUTOVER, queries against `MintEvent` will 404 unless the customization is enhanced to remap to PascalCase. THIS IS A LOAD-BEARING DIVERGENCE that the metadata-diff test (T-A3.3) MUST catch. See docs/A-3-staging-dryrun-runbook.md §Substantive flags.

freeside-score.notes: All 5 are real production query shapes used by the scoring pipeline.

mediums.real_source: Mixed — cubquests-interface/lib/blockchain/envio.ts (BadgeHolder) is one real source. The remaining 4 are synthesized from the medium-blink/world-sources query shapes implied by score reads + envelope subjects. Operator should validate against actual mediums prod query log before A-4 cutover.
mediums.notes: 1 real (cubquests->BadgeHolder), 4 synthesized. SYNTHESIS_FLAG=true on the 4 synthesized.

sietch-discord.real_source: NOT FOUND in local checkouts. sietch-discord consumer queries could not be located (searched ~/bonfire, ~/Documents/GitHub).
sietch-discord.notes: All 5 synthesized from envelope subjects (mintDetected, etc.) + read-side shapes inferred from envio schema.graphql. SYNTHESIS_FLAG=true. Operator MUST validate against actual sietch-discord prod query log before A-4 cutover.

_meta.expectedShape_semantics: expectedShape is the GraphQL response shape (i.e. data.<RootField> = array of objects with these keys). The test harness asserts (a) the keys are present, (b) types match (string/number/null), (c) the root field name resolves (no `field 'X' not found` errors per cookbook §C-6).

fixtures.query: query FriendtechTrades($limit: Int!, $offset: Int!, $subject: String!, $isBuy: Boolean!) { FriendtechTrade(where: { subject: { _eq: $subject }, isBuy: { _eq: $isBuy } } limit: $limit offset: $offset order_by: { timestamp: desc }) { id trader subject isBuy shareAmount ethAmount timestamp chainId transactionHash blockNumber } }

query MiberaStakingDeposits($limit: Int!, $offset: Int!, $stakingContract: String!) { MiberaTransfer(where: { to: { _eq: $stakingContract }, isMint: { _eq: false } } limit: $limit offset: $offset order_by: { timestamp: desc }) { id from to tokenId timestamp chainId transactionHash blockNumber } }

query MiberaMints($limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { MiberaTransfer(where: { isMint: { _eq: true } } limit: $limit offset: $offset order_by: { timestamp: desc }) { id from to tokenId isMint timestamp chainId transactionHash blockNumber } }

query BgtBoosts($limit: Int!, $offset: Int!, $validatorPubkey: String!) { BgtBoostEvent(where: { validatorPubkey: { _eq: $validatorPubkey } } limit: $limit offset: $offset order_by: { timestamp: desc }) { id account validatorPubkey amount timestamp chainId transactionHash blockNumber } }

query MintEvents($limit: Int!, $offset: Int!, $collectionKey: String!) { MintEvent(where: { collectionKey: { _eq: $collectionKey } } limit: $limit offset: $offset order_by: { timestamp: desc }) { id collectionKey tokenId minter timestamp chainId transactionHash blockNumber } }
query GetBadgeHolders($limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { BadgeHolder(limit: $limit offset: $offset) { id address holdings } }

fixtures.sourceFile: synthesized — medium-blink read pattern (per nftMintDetected envelope subject + collectionKey discrim)
fixtures.query: query MediumsMintsByCollection($limit: Int!, $collectionKey: String!) { MintEvent(where: { collectionKey: { _eq: $collectionKey } } limit: $limit order_by: { blockNumber: desc }) { id collectionKey tokenId minter blockNumber transactionHash } }

fixtures.sourceFile: synthesized — aquabera blink renderer expects most-recent N deposits for medium feed
fixtures.query: query AquaberaRecentDeposits($limit: Int!) { AquaberaDeposit(limit: $limit order_by: { timestamp: desc }) { id user vault token0Amount token1Amount timestamp transactionHash } }

fixtures.sourceFile: synthesized — action-stream blink pattern (look up recent activity per address)
fixtures.query: query ActionsByActor($actor: String!, $limit: Int!) { Action(where: { actor: { _eq: $actor } } limit: $limit order_by: { timestamp: desc }) { id actionType actor primaryCollection timestamp chainId txHash numeric1 context } }

fixtures.sourceFile: synthesized — paddle medium-blink supply aggregate (count + sum-amount)
fixtures.query: query PaddleSupplyAggregate { PaddleSupply_aggregate { aggregate { count sum { mintAmount } } } }

fixtures.sourceFile: synthesized — sietch-discord notification bot reads recent mints to confirm Discord post is canonical
fixtures.query: query SietchRecentMintsConfirm($txHash: String!) { MintEvent(where: { transactionHash: { _eq: $txHash } } limit: 5) { id collectionKey tokenId minter transactionHash timestamp } }

fixtures.sourceFile: synthesized — sietch posts erc1155 mints by collection key
fixtures.query: query SietchErc1155Mints($collectionKey: String!, $limit: Int!) { Erc1155MintEvent(where: { collectionKey: { _eq: $collectionKey } } limit: $limit order_by: { timestamp: desc }) { id collectionKey tokenId value minter timestamp transactionHash chainId } }

fixtures.sourceFile: synthesized — sietch posts new-loan events as Discord embeds
fixtures.query: query SietchMiberaLoans($limit: Int!) { MiberaLoan(limit: $limit order_by: { createdAt: desc }) { id user loanId loanType amount createdAt chainId transactionHash tokenIds } }

fixtures.sourceFile: synthesized — sietch posts burn-summary (used for Stonehenge channel)
fixtures.query: query SietchNftBurnSummary($collectionKey: String!, $limit: Int!) { NftBurn(where: { collectionKey: { _eq: $collectionKey } } limit: $limit order_by: { timestamp: desc }) { id collectionKey tokenId from timestamp blockNumber transactionHash chainId } }

fixtures.sourceFile: synthesized — sietch posts treasury moves (TreasuryActivity entity)
fixtures.query: query SietchTreasuryActivity($limit: Int!) { TreasuryActivity(limit: $limit order_by: { timestamp: desc }) { id activityType actor amount timestamp chainId transactionHash } }
